items.title: 💥 Disaster Corner 💥 — Turning Developer Fails into Conference Wins (v0.1)
items.description: Event format for conferences with the goal of showcasing the human side of development by collecting stories of mishaps from developers' careers.

items.title: From Zero to Product : Smart Baby Sleep Led Bar Light
items.description: The full journey of building a smart baby sleep LED bar light — from Arduino firmware and BLE to a custom Android app.

items.title: Performance vs Trust, from the idea to the reality
items.description: How to build high-performance teams rooted in trust — lessons inspired by Navy SEAL team dynamics.
